settings.image_alt: Lighting Souq showroom interior in Doha
settings.title: Lighting specialists, not a marketplace
settings.body: Lighting Souq curates every fitting we sell and backs it with local warranty and real advice. We are the smart-lighting specialist generalists and marketplaces cannot match — from a single bulb to a whole home.

settings.heading: Why LightingSouq
settings.subtitle: The difference you feel from the first message to the final fitting.

settings.title: Local warranty
settings.text: Genuine stock with warranty you can claim in Qatar — not grey-market imports.

settings.title: Real advice
settings.text: Talk to specialists who confirm compatibility before you buy.

settings.title: Fast delivery
settings.text: Same-day Doha delivery and GCC shipping, with showroom pickup.

settings.title: Real people behind every order
settings.body: Our Doha showroom team lives and breathes lighting. Drop in to see fittings lit in person, or message the team for spec help — the same experts answer online and in store.

settings.heading: Backed by GGI Lighting
settings.content:
Lighting Souq is the consumer face of GGI Lighting, our B2B parent and importer. That backbone means direct sourcing, genuine stock and volume pricing for projects.

Running a project or trade order? We can route you to the right pricing and lead times.

settings.heading: Questions about a project or product?
settings.text: Message our team for spec, compatibility or sourcing help — real people, fast replies.
